title: 20X Lavender filled bags drawers,(7x9cm) wardrobe fresheners，lavender moth repellent for wardrobes, suitable for pillows, cars, shoe cabinets, cupboards
features: Premium lavender pouch. Keep it high quality and fresh. Vacuum packing keeps dry
The lavender flowers are gently dried before we fill them into the scented pouches. We use natural, intensely scented blue lavender blossoms in premium quality for the lavender cushions.
Lavender scented sachets are traditionally popular as an aid to sleep and provide a soothing, pleasant lavender scent. Simply knead lightly to freshen up
The lavender scented sachets drive textile moths out of the wardrobe and help effectively against moth infestation in clothing and as a precaution against moth infestation of clothing moths.
Lavender without additives - richly scented, dried lavender blossoms for scented pillows, scented sachets, lavender sachets, fragrances, lavender in bulk
description: Product description Our lavender flowers come from controlled cultivation and are picked and gently dried in the sun, thus retaining the typical fragrance. These flowers are completely natural and therefore suitable for use in the production of scented pillows, scented pots and intensely scented soaps. Our lavender flowers contain no artificial fragrances and provide a fresh, high quality product with <1% stem and leaf content. Vacuum packing keeps them fresher for longer Safety Warning Warning: This product contains natural lavendIt can cause allergic reactions in some people. Keep out of reach of children and pets. Do not ingest. Dispose safely after use.
